summary: Referral/Invite page testing completed successfully. All 5 levels of referral data load correctly, active/inactive status is accurately determined using multiple criteria (mining session, bonus collection, tap game, rain drop), and Network Analytics modal displays comprehensive network health data.

issues: Route is /referrals not /invite as mentioned in requirements - this is a documentation issue, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: check_user_active_status() now uses $or to check both 'created_at' and 'timestamp' fields for transactions (lines 1274-1277, 1287-1290)
Active status correctly determined by: 1) Active mining session, 2) Bonus collected in 24h, 3) Tap game/Rain drop played in 24h
All 5 referral levels display correctly with accurate active/inactive counts
Network Analytics modal shows health score, activity rate, subscription distribution, and level distribution
seed_data_creation: Used existing admin user with 6 referrals (5 direct, 1 level 2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral system is fully functional. The route is /referrals (not /invite). Admin user has 6 total referrals with 4 active users. Active status is determined by mining session, bonus collection, or game activity in last 24 hours.

Referral page loads at /referrals.details: Page loads with 'Invite & Earn' header and all components

All 5 levels of referral data displayed.details: Direct (5 users, 3 active), Level 2 (1 user, 1 active), Levels 3-5 (0 users)

Active referral count accurate.details: 4 active users out of 6 total - matches backend data

Active status for mining session.details: Users with mining_active=True show as ACTIVE (reason: mining_session_active)

Active status for tap game.details: Users who played tap game in 24h show as ACTIVE (reason: game_played_24h)

Active status for rain drop.details: Users who played rain drop in 24h show as ACTIVE (reason: game_played_24h)

Active status for bonus collection.details: Users who collected bonus in 24h show as ACTIVE (reason: bonus_collected_24h)

Network Analytics modal.details: Opens and shows health score (50), activity rate (66.7%), subscription distribution, level distribution

Apply Referral Code feature.details: Button visible, API validates user and code correctly

Referral code display.details: ADMIN8175C... displayed with Copy Code and WhatsApp share buttons

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Active status check was querying 'created_at' field but transactions use 'timestamp' field
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Now using $or to check both 'created_at' and 'timestamp' fields in check_user_active_status()
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Active users correctly identified with proper reasons (bonus_collected_24h, game_played_24h, mining_session_active)

api_endpoints_tested.response: Returns all 5 levels with user details and active status
Returns health score, activity metrics, subscription/level distribution
Returns tree structure for network visualization
Validates user and referral code correctly
